commit.message:
Add regex-hiding-non-determinism scan pattern for tests

When a test helper uses regex to work around non-deterministic values
(random IDs, timestamps), ask whether mocking the source would allow
exact literal assertions instead — which are clearer and more valuable
as documentation.

Trained against PR #7884 — reviewer independently found that mocking
Guid.createRandom + useFakeTimers enables exact path assertions,
citing that master already does this.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
sets OTEL_SERVICE_NAME so Ruby SDK exports correct service.name

OTLP metrics from the Ruby OTel SDK arrive at metro with job="" because
the SDK does not set service.name by default. The job label in prometheus
remote write comes from the resource attribute service.name, so metric-level
add_label for job does not work.

Fix: export OTEL_SERVICE_NAME in the startup script with the same URN format
used by the prometheus scrape job_name. The Ruby SDK picks this up and sets
it as service.name, which the main collector maps to the job label in
prometheus remote write.

commit.message:
Add AKS/Bags/Sorts.lean: seiferasNetwork_sorts theorem statement

States the top-level sorting correctness theorem for the Seiferas network,
with simplified hypotheses (single hcap_cond at numStages, inlined hconv).
Three sorry'd theorems: converged_of_stranger_bound, finishAt_sorts_of_converged,
seiferasNetwork_sorts. Two proved helpers: strangers_eq_zero_of_bound_lt_one,
all_native_ancestor_of_strangers_zero.

Also fixes pre-existing build errors in Strange.lean:
- Parameter ordering (t before hcap_cond) in parent_stranger_eq1_le/stranger_bound_succ
- rw failure in foldl_card_filter (Lean 4.29 compat)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: affichage détaillé section Acheter avec calculs complets

Refonte complète de l'affichage "Acheter ici" avec informations détaillées :

**Ligne 1 : Identification et destination**
- Nom de la commodité + conditionnement (8-32 SCU)
- Flèche → vers destination
- Notation système : "Stanton.Lorville" si système différent
- Distance en Gm depuis le graphe de transport

**Ligne 2 : Calculs financiers détaillés**
- Quantité achetable : min(cargo vaisseau, stock disponible estimé)
- Total achat : quantité × prix_achat
- Total vente : double affichage
  * Prix si tout vendu : quantité × prix_vente
  * Prix limité par inventaire terminal vendeur (X invendus)
- Profit total calculé

**Estimations intelligentes**
- Stock disponible basé sur status_buy (Out=0%, Max=100%)
- Inventaire restant terminal vendeur basé sur status_sell
- Calcul invendus si terminal vendeur saturé

**Prérequis**
- Nécessite vaisseau actif défini (/ship set <nom>)
- Avertissement si cargo = 0 SCU

**Exemple d'affichage** :
```
▼ Acheter ici

Agricultural Sup.  (8-32)  →  Lorville  49.3 Gm
  32 SCU  Achat: 816  →  Vente: 867 (820 - 4 invendus)  +51

Agricium  (32)  →  Stanton.Area18  52.1 Gm
  32 SCU  Achat: 816  →  Vente: 867  +51
```

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace vendor/product names with generic placeholders for IP protection

Systematically replaced all specific product and tool names across 16 files
with generic placeholders to protect intellectual property while maintaining
repository functionality as an open-source PM intelligence framework.

Replacements include:
- Image builder tools → [IMAGE_BUILDER]
- IaC/config management → [IAC_TOOL], [CONFIG_MGMT_TOOL]
- Security/vuln platforms → [VULN_PLATFORM_A], [VULN_SCANNER_X]
- Cloud providers → [CLOUD_PROVIDER_A/B/C/D]
- CI/CD and VCS → [CI_PLATFORM], [VCS_PLATFORM]
- Compliance standards → generic "compliance benchmarks"

All customer architecture examples, skill documentation, and workflow
examples now use consistent generic placeholders. Repository is now
safe for public sharing without IP leakage.

Fix 1B GT match highlighting: check exact_text field in claim lookup

highlighted in the Discovery tab.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Stop tearing down wlan1 in nodeconfig to prevent dongle crash

The ath9k_htc firmware crashes when wlan1 is brought down and back up
(mesh leave + link set down). nodeconfig only needs bat0 cleaned up
after scanning — the mesh service (mesh-fix.sh) handles wlan1 setup
from any state. Removing the wlan1 teardown prevents the firmware
crash that leaves the dongle missing on subsequent service starts.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: cypherpunk hardening v2.7 — NIP-44, PSK forums, BIP-85, killer chat UI

Chiffrement:
- NIP-44 (ChaCha20-Poly1305 + HKDF) remplace NIP-04 (AES-CBC vulnérable padding oracle)
- Forums privés: PSK aléatoire 256 bits via generateForumKey() remplace SHA256(nom)
- encryptForumWithKey/decryptForumWithKey câblés dans MessagesProvider (send + receive)

Identité:
- BIP-85: seeds enfants isolés (Bitcoin/Nostr/MeshCore) via deriveBip85Seed()
- Compromission d'un domaine n'affecte pas les autres

UI Messagerie:
- Reply to message: swipe long-press → quote bar + quote block dans la bulle
- Emoji reactions: MessageActionsSheet (bottom sheet) avec 7 emojis rapides + toggle
- Profile sheet: tap sur expéditeur → NodeID, pubkey copiables, badges E2E/Nostr/Mesh
- Encryption indicator: affiche algo réel (NIP-44/Mesh E2E/PSK) selon transport actif
- MessageActionsSheet remplace les Alert natifs (Répondre/Copier/Récupérer/Supprimer)

Forums:
- UI toggle Public/Privé dans le modal de création
- Forum privé Créer: génération PSK + affichage/copie + avertissement sécurité
- Forum privé Rejoindre: champ PSK avec masquage + validation 64 chars
- Fix: handleJoinDiscoveredForum passe skipAnnounce=true (fin du double kind:40)
- PSK persistée en AsyncStorage + chargée en mémoire au démarrage

commit.message:
Add interactive knowledge graph visualization (#361)

* feat: add interactive knowledge graph to About page

Replace the static resume view on screen with a force-directed knowledge
graph that visualizes career as an explorable network of ~30 nodes
(roles, skills, projects, education, essays, topics). The existing
Resume component is preserved unchanged for print/PDF via print:block.

- d3-force SVG graph with drag, zoom/pan, hover highlight, click select
- Slide-out detail panel (framer-motion) for selected nodes
- Mobile fallback: grouped collapsible list below 768px
- Two-level lazy loading: ForceGraph only downloaded on desktop
- Graph/list toggle, toolbar with LinkedIn/Share/PDF buttons
- Full i18n support (EN + ZH) via translations.ts
- Deep-link hash compatibility (#experience → selects Google node)
- Dark mode support with theme-aware node colors

https://claude.ai/code/session_015gFjYZokyhPPfpptAdaFLT

* fix: sync pnpm-lock.yaml with new d3 dependencies

The Vercel build failed because pnpm-lock.yaml was out of date with
package.json after adding d3-drag, d3-force, d3-selection, d3-zoom
and their @types/* counterparts. Regenerated lockfile with pnpm install.

https://claude.ai/code/session_015gFjYZokyhPPfpptAdaFLT

* fix: make knowledge graph fill full viewport height on desktop

The transition wrapper used min-h-full (content-driven) inside a
scrollable container, so h-full on KnowledgeGraphView resolved to
minimum content height instead of filling the panel. Switch to h-full
for the ABOUT view so the height chain propagates correctly to the
ForceGraph SVG.

https://claude.ai/code/session_015gFjYZokyhPPfpptAdaFLT

* feat: replace "What I'm Working On" with site overview navigation

Replace the NowSection (which exposed confidential work projects) with
two navigational cards that orient first-time visitors: an Interactive
Resume card linking to the knowledge graph, and an AI Digital Twin card
describing the chat feature. Remove the redundant bottom Resume CTA.

- Delete NowSection.tsx and content/now.json
- Update BrowsePanel with overview cards (blue graph icon, green chat icon)
- Update i18n translations (EN + ZH) with new welcome-oriented copy

https://claude.ai/code/session_015gFjYZokyhPPfpptAdaFLT

* fix: use theme-aware colors for knowledge graph legend in dark mode

The legend dots always used NODE_COLOR_MAP[type].light, ignoring dark
mode. Now reads the resolved theme from ThemeContext and picks the
matching color variant.

https://claude.ai/code/session_015gFjYZokyhPPfpptAdaFLT

* fix: use theme-aware node colors in list fallback and detail panel

GraphListFallback and NodeDetailPanel had the same hardcoded .light
color bug as the legend. Now all three read the resolved theme from
ThemeContext so dot colors match the graph nodes in dark mode.

All node colors pass WCAG AA contrast (3:1+ for non-text graphical
elements) against both light (#ffffff) and dark (#0f172a) backgrounds.

https://claude.ai/code/session_015gFjYZokyhPPfpptAdaFLT

* fix: improve text contrast in detail panel and list fallback for WCAG AA

Swap text-slate-400/dark:text-slate-500 to text-slate-500/dark:text-slate-400
in secondary text (connected-to labels, subtitles, counts). The old
pattern gave 2.56:1 (light) and 3.75:1 (dark); the new one gives
4.76:1 and 6.96:1, both passing WCAG AA 4.5:1 for small text.

Also bump bullet dot color from slate-300/600 to slate-400/500.

https://claude.ai/code/session_015gFjYZokyhPPfpptAdaFLT

* feat: make connected-to nodes clickable in detail panel

Clicking a connected node badge in the sidebar now navigates to that
node's detail view, replacing the current panel content.

https://claude.ai/code/session_015gFjYZokyhPPfpptAdaFLT

* feat: persist connected-node highlight when a node is selected

Extract highlight/fade logic into reusable applyHighlight() so the
same dimming effect that fires on hover also stays active while a
node is selected. On mouseleave, the graph restores the selected
node's highlight instead of resetting to default.

https://claude.ai/code/session_015gFjYZokyhPPfpptAdaFLT

---------
